news.title: New Import Regulations for Electronic Components in 2026
news.summary: Updated tariffs and documentation requirements for importing semiconductors and PCBs.
news.summary_cn: 半导体和PCB进口的最新关税和文件要求。

news.title: Huaqiangbei Metro Expansion: New Exit Opens
news.title_cn: 华强北地铁扩建：新出口开放
news.summary: Exit E now connects directly to SEG Plaza, improving access for buyers.
news.summary_cn: E出口现在直接连接赛格广场，方便买家进出。

news.title: LED Component Prices Drop 15% in Q2 2026
news.summary: Oversupply from manufacturers leads to price reductions across LED strips and drivers.
news.summary_cn: 制造商供过于求导致LED灯带和驱动器价格全面下降。
